modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Touch panel displays a blank screen and won't turn on.

full_description_text: The touch panel in the smart classroom is not functioning properly. It either loads to a blank white screen or hangs during startup. Additionally, there is an error message indicating a CNX Connection Disconnected, suggesting that the system may be offline.
short_description: Touch panel displays a blank screen and won't turn on.
description: The touch panel in the smart classroom is not functioning properly. It either loads to a blank white screen or hangs during startup. Additionally, there is an error message indicating a CNX Connection Disconnected, suggesting that the system may be offline.
